CustomField.description: Number of Contact records processed per batch execution during soft credit rollup calculations. Used by both the legacy and Customizable Rollups engines. Default is 200. Reduce if the batch job fails due to governor limits. Soft credit rollups aggregate Opportunity amounts based on Opportunity Contact Roles.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Contacts per batch during soft credit rollup calculations. Default is 200. Reduce if the rollup job hits governor limits.
CustomField.label: Contact Soft Credit Batch Size
